EBU R128.description: Standard broadcast europeo (TV, radio). Target -23 LUFS ±1 dB, TP max -1 dBTP

EBU R128 S1 (Streaming).description: EBU R128 per streaming (Spotify, Tidal). Target -16 LUFS, TP max -1 dBTP

EBU R128 S2 (Podcast).description: EBU R128 S2 per podcast/audiobook. Target -18 LUFS, TP max -1 dBTP

Podcast (Generico).description: Target generico podcast. -16 a -20 LUFS, TP max -1 dBTP

AES71 (Dispositivi Portatili).description: AES71-2018 per dispositivi portatili. Target -16 LUFS, TP max -1 dBTP

YouTube.description: YouTube normalizza a -14 LUFS. TP max -1 dBTP consigliato

Spotify.description: Spotify Loud normalizza a -14 LUFS. TP max -1 dBTP

Apple Music / iTunes.description: Apple Sound Check normalizza a -16 LUFS. TP max -1 dBTP

Amazon Music.description: Amazon Music normalizza a -14 LUFS. TP max -2 dBTP consigliato

Netflix.description: Netflix dialogue-anchored. Target ~ -27 LUFS dialogo, TP max -2 dBTP

ATSC A/85 (USA Broadcast).description: Standard broadcast USA/Canada. Target -24 LKFS ±2 dB, TP max -2 dBTP

ARIB TR-B32 (Giappone).description: Standard broadcast giapponese. Target -24 LUFS, TP max -1 dBTP

ETSI TS 102 366 (DVB).description: Standard DVB per digital video broadcasting. Target -23 LUFS, TP max -1 dBTP

AES77 (Cinema).description: AES77 per cinema digitale. Target -24 LUFS, headroom esteso

ISO/IEC 23003-4 (MPEG-H).description: MPEG-H 3D Audio loudness. Target -24 LUFS, TP max -1 dBTP
